blocks.content:
Welcome to the configure grouping and timing learning path. You'll edit a notification policy to control how alerts are batched and how frequently notifications are sent.

Grouping determines which alerts are bundled into a single notification. Timing controls how long Grafana waits before sending the first notification, how often it sends updates, and how long it waits before repeating an unchanged alert.

## Here's what to expect

When you complete this path, you'll be able to:

- Navigate to the Notification policies page
- Edit the default policy's Group by setting
- Adjust the three timing options: group wait, group interval, and repeat interval
- Save the updated policy

## Before you begin

Before you start, ensure you have:

- A Grafana Cloud account. To create one, refer to [Grafana Cloud](https://grafana.com/signup/cloud/connect-account).
- At least one configured notification policy (the default policy is sufficient)
- Editor or Admin role (required to edit notification policies)

## Troubleshooting

If you get stuck, we've got your back! Where appropriate, troubleshooting information is just a click away.
